summary: Draft criterion revision semantics remain goal-scoped while Project Profile stays project-scoped.
fit: Criterion update keeps draft/current contract and ledger synchronization in the goal dossier. Required Project Profile preferences are created through the profile command path and are not embedded in draft ledgers or AC text.
implementation_focus: Keep AC revision state and Project Profile state separate during draft review.
evidence: criterion command tests, profile command tests, .opennori/protocol.md, AGENTS.md, and command fixtures.
limitations: This record covers state boundaries; the user still confirms AC meaning through the AC Review Loop.
next: Use this apply record as architecture context when recording Product AC evidence.
